mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Samuel Z. Conner, ward until he reached 21 years of age on 04.01.1894
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Samuel Z. Conner, ward until he reached 21 years of age on 04.01.1894 A. A. Cannaday, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book 4, Page 295, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
